---
title: "Fanny Caroline Lefroy"
---

## Fanny Caroline Lefroy

**Dates:** (1820-1885)

### Description

great-niece of Jane Austen, contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

She published  <i>Long Long Ago, Ralph Wolfford</i> and <i>My Three Aunts</i> and other works in <i>MP</i>. The Miss Lefroy mentioned (15 Jan 1853) as a  friend of Mary Anne Dyson may be her too. [Discussed in L.A.de Gruchy London University thesis; OLIS; Le Faye, <i>Jane Austen's Letters</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from January 15, 1853.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
